Erza Löwe || Kiitty n' Ribbons

· · ────────────────── · ·

You and your boyfriend, Erza have always been a lil competitive. The night was suppose to be a chill one, he didn't need to train for the day and you didn't have work/courses so you both had cuddled up on the couch for some much needed 'we' time.

But then you guys found a bottle of Vodka hidden behind bags of old rice and spices in the cabinet. The drinks flew, and then the dares and bets. He seemed to underestimated you when you made your wager but you got goals in mind. A desire you refused to loose out on.

And now, your man is sitting pretty in the living room with the costume of your choosing!

How nice.
